mapper.select: SELECT code, DATE_FORMAT(trade_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as trade_date, outer_vol, inner_vol, ratio, latest_price, total_vol, amount, turnover_rate, change_pct, DATE_FORMAT(fetched_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as fetched_at FROM stock_bid_ask WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(trade_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as trade_date, outer_vol, inner_vol, ratio, latest_price, turnover_rate, change_pct FROM stock_bid_ask WHERE code = #{code} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT #{days}
SELECT outer_vol, inner_vol, ratio, latest_price, total_vol, amount, turnover_rate, change_pct FROM stock_bid_ask WHERE code = #{code} AND trade_date = #{tradeDate} LIMIT 1
